title: Wynncraft: Open canvas
description: Alternative font, refined armor, legacy reimplement and more Wynncraft QoL
body:
# Wynncraft Open canvas
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/985de40e02871fe8f40f8d96aeb7b80b6100e8e5.png) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/wynncraft-open-canvas?style=flat&logo=modrinth&label=Downloads&color=00ae5b)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynncraft-open-canvas) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC_4.0-blue)](https://gitlab.com/met4l.mix/wynncraft-altered/-/blob/main/LICENSE.md) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1422420467712655453?style=flat&logo=discord&label=Discord&color=%235865F2&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FaDX9f6euwX)](https://discord.gg/aDX9f6euwX) [![ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support-8A2BE2?style=flat&logo=Ko-fi&logoColor=white&color=gray)](https://ko-fi.com/K3K51RMPIV)
> **Features**
| Todo | Status | |:---|---:| | Alternative font for hud, tooltip and dialogue. | ✅ | | Refined armor based on `pre-2.1.3`. | ✅ | | Select between main pack and addons. | ✅ | | Reimplement selected legacy assets. | 🔄 | | More _(coming soon)_ | ... |
> **Addon list**
| Addon | Summary | |:---|---:| | 1 | Add Alternative font to must GUI. | | 2 | Extra Interface for addon 1 (may be broken). | | 3 | Reimplement selected legacy assets. | | 4 | Some tweaks to character's portrait. |
--------------------------------------- > **Note** - Make sure to place it on top of the server pack (require [Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) or [Serverpack Priority](https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpack-priority)) - If you want to use contents from my pack then DM innert6142 on discord for permission.
